PLAINTIFFS MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

No appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs motion for order granting leave to file first amended complaint is granted. Plaintiffs have leave to file a First Amended Complaint for Survival, Wrongful Death, including leave to add two existing defendants (Chevron Phillips Chemical Company LP and Atlantic Richfield Company) to the First through Fourth causes of action and to remove those same defendants from the Eighth and Ninth causes of action, as identified in the Notice of Motion. The First Amended Complaint is deemed served as of the date of granting this motion on all defendants who have previously appeared. No opposition filed. Prevailing party is to prepare a proposed order for the Court's signature. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Matter not reported. (503/CML)
